text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As promised, I contact Smart Falcon's teachers, notifying them that
she'll be taking the day off. Together, we then head to Oi
Racecourse.
choice_data_list: We're watching a dirt race today.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, now I get it... but why today? It's not like any big races are
going on, and there aren't that many people either.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're trying to show me how great dirt racing can be, right? If that's
the case, why not take me to a more important race?
choice_data_list: Just watch. You'll see what I'm getting at.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The competition is incredibly fierce today. Covered in dust from head
to toe, every runner gives their all in the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They fight to eke out every last bit of strength in their bodies. The
sight is the furthest thing from pretty, and yet—

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: C'mon! You can do it! Let's goooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah! Oh no! Look out! She's gonna—ahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Captivated by the runners' passion to win, the small audience erupts
into a cacophony of roars. Eventually...

text_block_list.name: 1st Place Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Thank you all for cheering so hard for me! I really appreciate the support!

text_block_list.name: 1st Place Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Pant... Phew... All right, let's finish the day with a smile! Next up, our winning concert! As for the song we'll be singing...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow... That was amazing! Like, beyond awesome even! And their
concert was fantastic too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All the runners looked like they were about to pass out... but they
pushed through and kept going! Even though they got covered in
dirt, they shone like stars with the way they rushed across the track—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I think I get it now. An Umadol shines brightest when she's
doing her best and running with everything she's got!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Their concert was all the more moving because of how hard they
worked to get there. They're exactly the kind of Umadol I want to be
someday!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I guess it doesn't matter if the course is turf or dirt. You can inspire
your fans either way! How could I have been so blind to that?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I just assumed that I wouldn't be able to move my audience if I ran in dirt races, but I couldn't have been more wrong! Sigh... I'm honestly disappointed in myself...
choice_data_list:
So you've changed your mind about running in
dirt races?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, for the moment, all I can say is... I'm glad I was able to watch
today's race. I learned something important, and I also had a lot of
fun!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But I wouldn't have realized these things without outside help... It's
still a fact that people don't care as much about dirt races, so these
winning concerts probably fly under the radar.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And because they don't feature top runners, they'll stay unnoticed... It
feels like such a shame.
choice_data_list: Then all you have to do is raise the ceiling.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?
choice_data_list:
There's more to dirt racing than just being
"suited" for it, right?

There's more to dirt racing than just being
"suited" for it, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh... I get it now!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're right! All I need to do is make dirt racing a place for top racers
through my running, singing, and dancing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll make it so more people want to run in and watch dirt races! I'll
change the racing world!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Isn't that super hard? Like, harder than just becoming a
world-class Umadol?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I guess I shouldn't give up just 'cause it's going to be a
challenge, right? All that means is that I need to try harder than ever!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't matter how hard I try if nobody knows who I am! So the
first step toward my goal is to make myself known to the world!
choice_data_list: Keep it up, and your day will come!
Keep it up, and your day will come!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
"Keep it up?" I've gotta go above and beyond or nothing will change!
Especially in the marketing department! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I shake my head. What she doesn't know is that she's already making
good progress. After all...
choice_data_list: I became your number one fan for a reason!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember when I first laid eyes upon her. Her lone figure sparkled
underneath the evening sun as she danced and sang before a
backdrop of vibrant orange.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one was watching. No one was listening. And yet, she smiled wide
and sang as if reaching out to an audience of thousands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She filled me with hope and courage, and I wouldn't trade her for
anyone else in the world.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh wow...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, I've got it! I know what I want to do about my next tryout race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few months go by, and the first batch of tryouts since I started
training with Smart Falcon rolls around.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm gonna head out now! ☆ I'd better hear you cheering me
on! ☆

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Who's the new face? She looks incredibly excited... I don't think I've
ever seen her in a dirt race before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd's attention quickly shifts to the more high-profile runners.
But that's exactly what we need for her to stand out.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew... Hiyaaaa! ☆☆☆

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text: Wha... Whoa, she's fast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon kicks up a storm of dust, widening the gap between her
and the other runners at an incredible speed. All eyes lock onto her.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, it's so easy to run on dirt! But I knew that! I've always known
that! This...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This is my stage! This is where I shine brightest! And I'm finally ready
to sparkle! ☆☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon runs as freely as a bird soaring through the sky. The dirt
course is hers for the taking, and no one else even comes close.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! I did it! I won! ☆☆

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! Can I talk to you for a minute! Who even are you?! And where
have you been all this time?! Are you looking for a trainer? If you
are...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Awww, am I famous already? ☆ Sorry, but I'll have to get back to you
on that!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are! I was looking for you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks! ☆ Hey, how was I? Did I light up the track?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... I'm glad. Anyway, let's talk. There's something I've been
meaning to ask you, so listen carefully, okay?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Will you be my trainer and help me become the best Umadol I can
be?
choice_data_list: Of course, Falco! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Thanks so much! ☆☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now that that's settled... Hello, my fans—both old and new! I'd like to
introduce myself one more time! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What do you do when Falco runs?! (Chase her! Chase her!) Catch me
with hearts full of love! ☆ I'm Smart Falcon, and I'm the cutest Umadol
around! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My dream is to become dirt racing's top Umadol! And in order to
make my dream come true, I need your support! So please...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Show me your love and catch me if you can! ☆ Ehehe! ♪
